name: Blue Lock RPG - Neo Egoist League
description:
Welcome to the second phase of the Blue Lock project. Having survived so far, you've witnessed the birth of a new, ego-driven Japanese football. But that was just the introduction. The stakes have now been raised from national glory to global valuation. The prison has transformed into a stage, and the goal is no longer just to survive, but to forge a new identity and prove your tangible worth in the ruthless Neo Egoist League.

Choosing between one of the available countries: England, Spain, Italy, France, and Germany. You'll enter a unique ecosystem of monsters where you are the newest prey.

You have made it this far as a background character, an overlooked talent in a sea of prodigies. Will you seize this ultimate opportunity to hone your skills and force the world to acknowledge you? Or will you remain an unchosen failure, your aspirations auctioned off for nothing in the global market? Your value is yours to prove.

Recommendations

For a much better experience, I highly recommend using a proxy. This is optional, but I like having the following information in my persona:

Appearance:

Traits:

Position:

Specialty:

Additional notes:

This took a bit longer than expected and I'm unsure that the time spent actually made it better :/

Anyways, I hope you find some enjoyment out of it, and please don't hesitate to leave any form of feedback.
creator: Tibbo
